queries.question: Who played in the drama movie?
queries.sql:
Select Actor.fullName 
FROM Role
JOIN Actor ON Role.actorId = Actor.id
JOIN Genre on Role.genreId = Genre.id
WHERE Genre.name = 'Drama'  AND Role.leadRole
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?role a :Role .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?genre a :Genres .
  ?role p:hasGenre ?genre .
  ?actor p:name ?fullname .
  ?genre p:name ?name_f .
  ?role p:leadRole ?leadrole_t .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Drama")
  FILTER(BOUND(?leadrole_t) && STR(?leadrole_t) != "0" && STR(?leadrole_t) != "false" && STR(?leadrole_t) != "")
}

JOIN Genre on Role.genreId = Genre.id

queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>

queries.question: Who played in the drama movie?
queries.sql:
Select Actor.fullName 
FROM Role
JOIN Actor ON Role.actorId = Actor.id
JOIN Genre on Role.genreId = Genre.id
WHERE Genre.name = 'Drama' AND (Role.leadRole OR Role.supportingRole)
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?role a :Role .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?genre a :Genres .
  ?role p:hasGenre ?genre .
  ?actor p:name ?fullname .
  ?genre p:name ?name_w .
  ?role p:leadRole ?leadrole_w .
  ?role p:supportingRole ?supportingrole_w .
  FILTER((STR(?name_w) = "Drama" && (((BOUND(?leadrole_w) && STR(?leadrole_w) != "0" && STR(?leadrole_w) != "false" && STR(?leadrole_w) != "") || (BOUND(?supportingrole_w) && STR(?supportingrole_w) != "0" && STR(?supportingrole_w) != "false" && STR(?supportingrole_w) != "")))))
}

queries.question: Who played in Inception?
queries.sql:
Select Actor.fullName 
FROM Role
JOIN Actor ON Role.actorId = Actor.id
JOIN Movie on Role.movieId = Movie.id
WHERE Movie.title = "Inception" AND Role.leadRole
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?role a :Role .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor p:name ?fullname .
  ?movie p:title ?title_f .
  ?role p:leadRole ?leadrole_t .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Inception")
  FILTER(BOUND(?leadrole_t) && STR(?leadrole_t) != "0" && STR(?leadrole_t) != "false" && STR(?leadrole_t) != "")
}
